channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Mazda with no MOT abandoned outside 43 Barnfield Road, 7th March
item.description:
Photos taken 7th March 2026. Area is a dumping ground for abandoned cars.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 7th March
item.description:
TV outside no 4 Sandford Road and dumped rubbish in Sandford Road/Westmoreland Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandford Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole at the start of Calvert close, 7th March
item.description:
A previously repaired section of the road is crumbling again and a pot hole is forming.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Calvert Close, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Completely blocked storm drain on Haslam Street, 7th March
item.description:
Hi There, there is a storm drain on Haslam Street that is completely clogged. Could this be cleared out. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stopes Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole outside 62 Parkhurst Road, 7th March
item.description:
The neighbouring resident says a temporary repair was made but has quickly failed. It’s deep.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Parkhurst Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter /household rubbish, 7th March
item.description:
We live at the very end of Crusoe road Erith kent da81pj the people at 17Acrusoe road which is a cul de sac are filling their bins with all the wrong things and so the dustman won’t take they are also putting rubbish in other peoples bins so also going on front gardens 18 Crusoe road and in the wind is blowing in road paths and other gardens the people don’t care at 17A what happens to thier rubbish this has been going on for months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crusoe Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive litter in front garden, 7th March
item.description:
This rubbish has piled up for some months now and is a true eye sore to the area. I pass it daily and have even seen signs of pests more recently.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sidcup Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping trash outside the entrance to gibson gardens, 7th March
item.description:
There is an enormous amount of overflowing rubbish outside gibson gardens. this has be a persistent issue and now it seem to just be getting worse. its extremely disappointing that this issue is not being properly dealt
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyptipping, 7th March
item.description:
Outside 52 Forest Hill Road Please clear flytip of wood

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Forest Hill Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reporting street light out at the junction of footpath’s 19 and 18 by a block of 3 garages between Friday road and Crusoe road Erith Kent, 7th March
item.description:
Street light out between foot paths 18 and 19 by 3garages Erith da81pj
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crusoe Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti and flypostering, 7th March
item.description:
Peckham Rye. Remove graffiti from camera post

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 238, Peckham Rye, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No Forest on pedestrian space Datchelor Place., 7th March
item.description:
Don’t park next to my front window, typically selfish and stupid behaviour endorsed by a socially thoughtless company Move your product

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 51, Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Pot hole, 7th March
item.description:
Please arrange to inspect and repair pot holes. Thanks
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brampton Road, Bexleyheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken play equipment, 7th March
item.description:
Multiple broken pieces of playground equipment, damage to the wooden borders. Dangerous for the children using the playground. Well overdue an upgrade of the play equipment
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barnes Cray Road, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter along Hawthorne crescent, 7th March
item.description:
A buildup of litter along Hawthorne Crescent
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hawthorne Crescent, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Vehicle, 7th March
item.description:
Registration Number RO61 PVZ Citroen Berlingo, outside 264 Creighton Avenue, East Finchley N2 9BP for at least 6 months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dairy Mews, Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed van, 7th March
item.description:
Outside no 82
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, The Drive, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes across the junction of Shakespeare Road and Railton Road, 7th March
item.description:
Several potholes across the whole junction of Shakespeare Road and Railton Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shakespeare Road, Herne Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very deep and wide pothole, 7th March
item.description:
There is a massive pothole at the junction of Prentis Road and Streatham High Road. It has been there since the beginning of January and getting worse by the day
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rosendale Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Time table holder missing, 7th March
item.description:
Outside Harris accademy Time table holder is missing so no timetable information is able to be displayed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Rye, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
